texto: Maybe Trünicht was to society what a cancer cell could be to the body—consuming the healthy cells’ nutrition so that it alone would multiply, grow stronger and bigger, and at last kill its host. Trünicht would agitate for war one day, insist on democracy the next, and steadily increase his power and influence while never taking responsibility for anything he said. Therefore, the stronger he got, the weaker society would become, until he would finally consume it.
explicacao: Citação de Yoshiki Tanaka sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Maybe Trünicht was to society what a cancer cell could be to the body—consuming the healthy cells…” articula reflexao, politics, would em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
